visualizations.title: Greatest Common Divisor Definition
visualizations.description: The largest element in the intersection of the factor sets of two numbers.

steps.explanation: Intersection: The set of all positive integers that divide both a and b evenly.
Maximum: Selecting the single largest value in that shared set.

visualizations.title: Venn Diagram of Common Factors
visualizations.description: Watch how the factors of 12 and 18 are sorted, highlighting the common factors {1, 2, 3, 6} in the overlap and identifying 6 as the GCD.
